text:
The Reluctant Heroes is the 2nd track on the "Attack on Titan" Original Soundtrack, written and sung by mpi. As with all the other pre-The Final Season OSTs, it was composed and arranged by .

Musical motifs

The chorus of this song (1:00-1:30) is a motif that appears in a couple of other tracks:

立body機motion (4:28-4:58)
cóunter・attàck-m'ænkάɪnd (5:09-5:27)
進撃vc-pf20130218巨人 (starting at 3:22, this track is a piano cover of the whole song, including the chorus at 4:40-5:30)
son2seaVer (2:45-3:06)

All occurrences

Episode 3 - Eren passes the Cadet Corps's omni-directional mobility gear test
Episode 9 - Levi's first action scene
Episode 13.5 - Eren plugs the hole in the Wall before waking up

Day by day
We have lost our edge
Don't you know?
Forgotten is the life we led
Now it seems
You don't care what the risk is
The peaceful times have made us blind

Can't look back
They will not come back
Can't be afraid
It's time after time
So once again
I'm hiding in my room
The peaceful times have made us blind

So you can't fly if you never try
You told me, oh, long ago
But you left the Wall
Outside the gate
So more than ever, it's real

It was like a nightmare
And it's painful for me
'Cause nobody wants to die too fast
Remember the day of grief
Now it's strange for me
I could see your face
I could hear your voice

Trivia

Cóunter・attàck-m'ænkάɪnd, The Reluctant Heroes ＜MODv＞, Dark Side Of The Moon, son2seaVer, 進撃vc-pf20130218巨人, and 立body機motion are all remixes of The Reluctant Heroes.
